# BEYONDVYU — Turn happy customers into authentic Google reviews
https://beyondvyu.com

## About
BEYONDVYU helps local businesses collect more authentic Google reviews with QR codes and an AI assistant that jogs your customers' memory — fully compliant with Google and FTC policy.

## Public pages
- Home: https://beyondvyu.com
- Pricing: https://beyondvyu.com/pricing
- Contact: https://beyondvyu.com/contact
- Terms of Service: https://beyondvyu.com/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://beyondvyu.com/privacy
- Refund Policy: https://beyondvyu.com/refund
